title: Possible Project Biology in Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: Possible Project- Biology in Evangelion             Quote Post by Priscus » Fri Sep 16, 2016 6:59 am So I had this idea for a project(and an excuse to watch EVA again) on Biology in Evangelion. I'd go through the series, and compile all the references made to biological concepts and terminologies, and then set out to explain and elaborate upon them. I also might discuss various beings in EVA from a biological/physiological perspective. The purpose would basically be for the edification of fellow fans. Would anyone be interested in actually reading this if I do it? Have I already been extensively beaten to the chase? Let me know, I'll probably start work on it today, since I'm idle until work tonight.

[]: Re: Possible Project- Biology in Evangelion             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Sep 16, 2016 1:40 pm Sure, go for it.

[]: Re: Possible Project- Biology in Evangelion             Quote Post by Director Black » Fri Sep 16, 2016 8:38 pm Hell yes! Always up for a damn good analysis video on Eva.

[]: Re: Possible Project- Biology in Evangelion             Quote Post by CommanderFish » Fri Sep 16, 2016 10:07 pm Director Black wrote: Hell yes! Always up for a damn good analysis video on Eva.
